name: M4A4 | 破浪狂飙
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted with a neon green base and finished with fictitious logos meant to evoke drift and tuning culture. Where \"Globoil 1 Synthetics\" meets \"ENTRI PERFORMANCE\"
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器的底色被定制涂装为霓虹绿，其表面印有虚构标识，意在彰显漂移与改装文化风格。 当 “环球石油 1 号合成燃料” 遇上 “恩特里性能改装”
